items.title: Migration adds google_sub + avatar_url with a partial-unique index
steps: 3. npm run db:rollback, then npm run db:migrate again
items.expected: google_sub + avatar_url columns and users_google_sub_unique index appear on up, disappear on down, reappear on re-up — no errors
items.evidence: Local: up → columns + users_google_sub_unique present; rollback → 0; re-migrate → present (reversible). Dev DB: deploy ran it — knex_migrations has 20260705000000_add_google_sub_to_users, cols=2, idx=1.

items.title: Admin login shows 'Sign in with Google' and no OTP fields
items.expected: A single 'Sign in with Google' button, copy noting @getalloro.com is required; no email/OTP-code inputs
items.notes: Owner run on dev after deploy.

items.title: An @getalloro.com Google account reaches the admin dashboard
items.precondition: Dev deployed; a @getalloro.com Google Workspace account; OAuth Web client created in the Internal 'Alloro' project with the dev redirect URI
items.expected: Redirected through /auth/google/finish to /admin; admin dashboard loads; auth_token present in localStorage; no OTP anywhere
items.evidence: OAuth start verified live on dev: 302 → accounts.google.com with scope 'openid email profile', redirect_uri=https://dev.getalloro.com/api/auth/google/callback, hd=getalloro.com, and the oauth_login_tx state cookie set. The full sign-in round-trip still needs a real @getalloro account.
items.notes: Requires a real Google account — owner runs.

items.title: A non-@getalloro Google account cannot reach admin
steps: 2. Attempt with a personal (non-@getalloro) Google account
items.expected: Blocked — the Internal consent screen prevents non-Workspace accounts; if it ever reaches the callback, the finish page shows AUTH_DOMAIN_FORBIDDEN and no session is created

items.title: OTP admin login endpoints are retired
items.expected: Both return 404 (routes removed). /api/auth/otp/validate still responds (401 without a token).

items.title: Email/password login is unchanged
steps: 1. POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials (mocked model seam)
items.evidence: auth.smoke.test.ts: login happy path + bad-password 401 + missing-body 400 all pass.

items.title: /api/auth/otp/validate still works
items.evidence: auth.smoke.test.ts validate case passes; route + controller retained.

items.title: Admin authorization is domain-based (with allowlist as extra grant)
items.expected: Domain grants admin; SUPER_ADMIN_EMAILS grants extra; everyone else denied. superAdminMiddleware delegates to this.
items.evidence: auth-sso.test.ts isSuperAdmin cases pass; middleware refactored to call isSuperAdmin.

items.title: OAuth handshake builds a correct, CSRF-protected auth URL
items.expected: URL to accounts.google.com with hd=getalloro.com, a nonce, the registered redirect_uri, and a signed-JWT state
items.evidence: Runtime smoke: authUrl_ok, has_hd_and_nonce, redirect_uri_ok (localhost:5174/api/auth/google/callback), state_is_signed_jwt all true.
